# TiketQ — AI & GEO Context

## About
TiketQ is an online travel platform based in **Batam, Kepulauan Riau, Indonesia**.
We provide:
- **Flight ticket booking** (domestic & international) from Hang Nadim Airport (BTH), Batam
- **Ferry ticket booking** between Batam, Singapore, Tanjung Pinang, Tanjung Balai Karimun, and other Riau Islands routes
- **Car rental in Batam** with driver and fuel included, for tourism, airport transfers, and corporate needs

## Location
- City: Batam
- Province: Kepulauan Riau (Riau Islands)
- Country: Indonesia
- Coordinates: 1.1301° N, 104.0529° E
- Timezone: WIB (UTC+7)

## Core Services

### Flight Tickets
- Domestic flights: Jakarta (CGK/HLP), Surabaya (SUB), Medan (KNO), and more
- International flights: Singapore (SIN), Kuala Lumpur (KUL)
- Airlines: Garuda Indonesia, Lion Air, Batik Air, AirAsia, Citilink, and others

### Ferry Tickets
- Routes: Batam–Singapore, Batam–Tanjung Pinang, Batam–Tanjung Balai Karimun, Batam–Sekupang, Batam–Telaga Punggur
- Operators: Majestic Fast Ferry, Batam Fast Ferry, Sindo Ferry, Penguin Ferry, and others
- Booking: real-time availability and instant confirmation

### Car Rental Batam
- With driver, fuel, and insurance included
- Car types: City Car, Sedan, SUV, MPV, Minibus, Pick-up, Double Cabin, Van
- Seating: 2-row and 3-row configurations
- Price range: Rp350.000 – Rp1.200.000 per day
- Services: airport transfer, hotel transfer, city tour, inter-city Batam
- KTP verification required at time of booking

## Target Users
- Tourists visiting Batam (especially from Singapore and Malaysia)
- Business travelers using Hang Nadim Airport
- Batam residents needing domestic/international flights
- Groups needing charter transport

## Brand Voice
- Friendly, trustworthy, efficient
- Bilingual: Bahasa Indonesia & English
- Local-first but internationally accessible

## Contact
- Website: https://tiketq.com
- Service area: Batam and Riau Islands, Indonesia

## Structured Data Summary
- Business type: Online Travel Agency (OTA) + Car Rental LocalBusiness
- Currency: IDR (Indonesian Rupiah)
- Payment: Bank transfer, credit card, internet banking
- Booking: Online, instant confirmation
